case_title: UNIFUND CORPORATION vs. POULDEN, VICTORIA et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-17-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-17-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1996, CONTINUED TO AUG-01-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PER COURT ORDER PENDING PAYMENT OF $14.00 ORDER FEE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-03-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-03-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. ($14.00 FILING FEE FOR ORDER STILL DUE AND PAYABLE), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-03-1996 CONTINUED FROM SEP-03-1996 TO OCT-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
